homepage.heroSubline: Transforming outdoor spaces with enduring quality. Expert concrete and hardscaping solutions across the Charlotte metro.
aboutText: JV Concrete & Hardscape LLC started with a simple goal: to deliver exceptional hardscaping services with unwavering integrity. We're a family-owned business rooted in Charlotte, dedicated to enhancing our community one project at a time.

We believe in a hands-on approach, from initial consultation to final inspection. Our team prioritizes clear communication, meticulous planning, and flawless execution. We treat every project, big or small, with the same level of dedication and precision.

We're proud to call Charlotte home and committed to contributing to its growth. We actively support local initiatives and strive to build lasting relationships with our clients, neighbors, and partners.

services.name: Concrete Patios
services.shortDescription: Durable and stylish concrete patios designed for Charlotte living.
services.description:
Transform your backyard into an inviting oasis with a custom concrete patio. We specialize in creating durable, aesthetically pleasing patios that enhance your outdoor living space. From stamped concrete mimicking natural stone to smooth, modern finishes, we offer a wide range of design options to complement your home's architecture and personal style. Our team carefully assesses the soil conditions unique to the Charlotte area, ensuring proper drainage and a stable foundation to withstand the region's humid summers and occasional ice storms. We handle every step of the process, from excavation and grading to pouring, finishing, and sealing. A well-designed concrete patio adds value to your home and provides a perfect space for entertaining, relaxing, and enjoying the beautiful North Carolina weather.

We offer a variety of concrete finishes including stamped, colored, and exposed aggregate. We also handle any necessary permitting and inspections to ensure compliance with local building codes. Our goal is to provide you with a patio that not only looks great but also stands the test of time.

faq.question: How long does it take to install a concrete patio?
faq.answer: The timeline varies depending on the size and complexity of the project, but most patios can be completed within 1-2 weeks. We'll provide a detailed schedule during the initial consultation.

faq.question: What type of maintenance is required for a concrete patio?
faq.answer: Concrete patios are relatively low-maintenance. Regular cleaning with a mild detergent and occasional resealing every 2-3 years will help protect the surface and keep it looking its best.

faq.question: Can you install a concrete patio over an existing patio?
faq.answer: In some cases, we can pour a new concrete patio over an existing one, but it depends on the condition of the existing surface. We'll assess the site to determine the best approach.

services.name: Driveway Installation & Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert driveway services for durable and attractive entrances.
services.description:
Your driveway is more than just a place to park your car; it's a key element of your home's curb appeal. We specialize in providing high-quality driveway installation and repair services throughout the Charlotte metro area. Whether you need a new driveway installed, an existing one repaired, or a complete replacement, our team has the expertise to deliver exceptional results. We understand the challenges posed by Charlotte's red clay soil and implement proven techniques to ensure a stable and long-lasting driveway. We offer a variety of materials, including concrete, asphalt, and gravel, to suit your budget and aesthetic preferences.

From addressing cracks and potholes to complete resurfacing, we handle all types of driveway repairs. We use industry-leading materials and techniques to ensure that your driveway is restored to its original condition. We also offer sealing services to protect your driveway from the elements and extend its lifespan. A properly installed and maintained driveway not only enhances the appearance of your home but also increases its value.

faq.question: How long does a new driveway installation take?
faq.answer: Typically, a new driveway installation takes between 3-5 days, depending on the size and complexity of the project. Weather conditions can also affect the timeline.

faq.question: What are the advantages of a concrete driveway over an asphalt driveway?
faq.answer: Concrete driveways are generally more durable and require less maintenance than asphalt driveways. They also offer a wider range of design options, including stamped and colored concrete.

faq.question: How often should I seal my driveway?
faq.answer: It's recommended to seal your driveway every 2-3 years to protect it from the elements and extend its lifespan. We offer professional sealing services to keep your driveway looking its best.

services.name: Retaining Walls
services.shortDescription: Structural and aesthetic retaining walls to manage Charlotte's landscape.
services.description:
Retaining walls are essential for managing slopes, preventing erosion, and creating usable outdoor spaces in Charlotte's varied terrain. We specialize in designing and building durable and aesthetically pleasing retaining walls that meet your specific needs. Whether you need a small garden wall or a large structural wall, our team has the expertise to deliver exceptional results. We understand the importance of proper drainage and soil stabilization, especially with the red clay soil prevalent in the area. We use a variety of materials, including concrete blocks, natural stone, and timber, to create retaining walls that are both functional and beautiful.

Our retaining walls are engineered to withstand the pressures of soil and water, ensuring long-term stability and performance. We handle all necessary permitting and inspections to ensure compliance with local building codes. We work closely with you to design a retaining wall that complements your landscape and enhances the value of your property. A well-designed retaining wall can transform unusable slopes into valuable outdoor living spaces.

faq.question: How long will my retaining wall last?
faq.answer: With proper design and construction, a retaining wall can last for many years. The lifespan depends on the materials used and the site conditions. We use high-quality materials and proven construction techniques to ensure long-term durability.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for a retaining wall?
faq.answer: Yes, in most cases, a permit is required for retaining wall construction. We handle all necessary permitting and inspections to ensure compliance with local building codes.

faq.question: What are the different types of retaining wall materials?
faq.answer: We offer a variety of retaining wall materials, including concrete blocks, natural stone, and timber. Each material has its own advantages and disadvantages in terms of cost, durability, and aesthetics.

services.name: Outdoor Fireplaces & Fire Pits
services.shortDescription: Custom outdoor fireplaces and fire pits for cozy Charlotte evenings.
services.description:
Extend your outdoor living season with a custom outdoor fireplace or fire pit. We specialize in designing and building beautiful and functional outdoor fireplaces and fire pits that create a warm and inviting atmosphere. Whether you're looking for a traditional wood-burning fireplace or a modern gas-powered fire pit, our team can bring your vision to life. We use a variety of materials, including brick, stone, and concrete, to create unique designs that complement your home's architecture and personal style.

An outdoor fireplace or fire pit provides a perfect gathering spot for family and friends. We handle every step of the process, from design and construction to installation and finishing. We ensure that your outdoor fireplace or fire pit is built to code and operates safely. We also offer a variety of accessories, such as seating, lighting, and decorative elements, to complete your outdoor living space. Enjoy the cool Charlotte evenings around a crackling fire with a custom-built outdoor fireplace or fire pit.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for an outdoor fireplace or fire pit?
faq.answer: Yes, in most cases, a permit is required for outdoor fireplace or fire pit construction. We handle all necessary permitting and inspections to ensure compliance with local building codes.

faq.question: What are the different fuel options for outdoor fireplaces and fire pits?
faq.answer: We offer both wood-burning and gas-powered options. Gas-powered fireplaces and fire pits are more convenient and require less maintenance, while wood-burning options provide a more traditional and rustic experience.

faq.question: How close can I build an outdoor fireplace or fire pit to my house?
faq.answer: Building codes vary depending on the location and the type of fireplace or fire pit. We ensure that your outdoor fireplace or fire pit is built to code and operates safely.

services.name: Paver Installation
services.shortDescription: Elegant and durable paver patios, walkways, and driveways for Charlotte homes.
services.description:
Enhance the beauty and functionality of your outdoor space with professionally installed pavers. We specialize in paver patios, walkways, driveways, and pool decks. Pavers offer a wide range of design options, allowing you to create a unique and personalized outdoor space that reflects your style. We use high-quality pavers from leading manufacturers, ensuring durability and long-lasting beauty. Our team has the expertise to handle all types of paver installations, from simple walkways to complex patios and driveways.

We carefully prepare the base to ensure proper drainage and stability. We also offer a variety of paver patterns and colors to complement your home's architecture and landscape. Pavers are a durable and low-maintenance option for enhancing your outdoor living space. They are also resistant to cracking and fading, making them a great choice for Charlotte's climate. Add a touch of elegance to your home with professionally installed pavers.

faq.question: What are the advantages of pavers over concrete?
faq.answer: Pavers offer a wider range of design options and are more resistant to cracking than concrete. They are also easier to repair, as individual pavers can be replaced without affecting the entire surface.

faq.question: How long will my paver patio last?
faq.answer: With proper installation and maintenance, a paver patio can last for many years. The lifespan depends on the quality of the pavers and the site conditions.

faq.question: How do I clean my paver patio?
faq.answer: Paver patios can be cleaned with a mild detergent and water. For tougher stains, you can use a paver cleaner specifically designed for outdoor use.

services.name: Outdoor Kitchens
services.shortDescription: Custom outdoor kitchens for ultimate Charlotte entertaining.
services.description:
Transform your backyard into an outdoor culinary paradise with a custom outdoor kitchen. We specialize in designing and building functional and stylish outdoor kitchens that meet your specific needs and lifestyle. Whether you're a seasoned chef or a casual griller, we can create an outdoor kitchen that enhances your outdoor entertaining experience. We use high-quality materials and appliances to ensure durability and performance. Our team has the expertise to handle all aspects of outdoor kitchen construction, from design and planning to installation and finishing.

We work closely with you to design an outdoor kitchen that complements your home's architecture and landscape. We offer a variety of features, including grills, smokers, refrigerators, sinks, and countertops. We also handle all necessary plumbing and electrical work. An outdoor kitchen provides a perfect space for cooking, dining, and entertaining in the beautiful Charlotte weather. Enjoy the convenience and luxury of an outdoor kitchen with family and friends.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for an outdoor kitchen?
faq.answer: Yes, in most cases, a permit is required for outdoor kitchen construction. We handle all necessary permitting and inspections to ensure compliance with local building codes.

faq.question: What appliances should I include in my outdoor kitchen?
faq.answer: The appliances you include in your outdoor kitchen depend on your cooking style and entertaining needs. Common appliances include grills, smokers, refrigerators, sinks, and side burners.

faq.question: What materials are best for outdoor kitchen countertops?
faq.answer: Popular countertop materials for outdoor kitchens include granite, concrete, and stainless steel. These materials are durable, weather-resistant, and easy to clean.

Known for its rapid growth in the late 1990s and 2000s, Huntersville boasts many suburban developments perfect for families and individuals looking for quality outdoor living spaces. We understand the unique needs of Huntersville homeowners, and we're committed to providing exceptional concrete and hardscape solutions that enhance your property's value and curb appeal.

From custom patios and walkways to durable driveways and retaining walls, our experienced team will transform your outdoor vision into reality. We take into account the hot, humid summers of the region when designing and installing our projects, ensuring long-lasting beauty and functionality. reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: JV Concrete transformed our backyard in Dilworth! The new stamped concrete patio is gorgeous, and the crew was professional and efficient. They handled the red clay soil perfectly, and the drainage is excellent. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David S.
reviews.text: Our driveway in Myers Park was cracked and crumbling. JV Concrete came out and repaired it quickly and affordably. It's not perfect but a huge improvement and should last for years. Good local company.

reviews.name: Jessica K.
reviews.text: We had a steep slope in our backyard that was causing erosion problems. JV Concrete built a beautiful and sturdy retaining wall that solved the problem and added value to our property. Great communication throughout the process!

reviews.name: Robert P.
reviews.text: JV Concrete built an amazing outdoor fireplace on our patio. We've already had so many cozy evenings enjoying it. The craftsmanship is excellent, and the design perfectly complements our home. Definitely recommend them!

reviews.name: Linda M.
reviews.text: JV Concrete installed a paver walkway leading to our front door. It looks fantastic! There was a slight delay due to weather, but they kept us informed every step of the way. Very happy with the result.

reviews.name: Chris B.
reviews.text: We had JV Concrete build our outdoor kitchen, and it's the best decision we made for our house. They handled electrical and plumbing with no issues, and it is the perfect setup for gatherings. They have an eye for detail and the craftsmanship is top tier.
